title: Phase 5 retrospective doc
predecessor: M35-T3 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit 51393f8 — audit view chips for Phase 5 events; NEW audit-event-chip-helpers.ts pure-helper module + audit-event-chip.tsx component shell + audit-event-chip.test.tsx 28 unit tests; 10 newly-chipped Phase 5 event types with payload-aware row summaries and 140-char clamp invariant; +28 unit 1134 → 1162; 100 test files green / 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean). Pre-ship T2 docblock-accuracy fix commit 54830fa cleared a stale RagIndexer-subscribes-to-vault-bus-events passage in the phase-5-integration.spec.ts header (spec body was already correct). M35-T2 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit 1108247 — cross-milestone integration E2E; NEW apps/desktop/e2e/phase-5-integration.spec.ts stitches M28 → M34 in one 3.7s Playwright run). M35-T1 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit b68d09b — performance defaults + clamp audit; all 10 defaults HELD on llama3.1:8b evidence). M35-T0 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit da4ce1f — plan doc).
goal: Author NEW docs/plans/2026-04-19-team-x-phase-5-retrospective.md. Locked 6-section structure per M35 plan doc §4.5. Retrospective captures the Phase 5 delivery arc (M28 RAG foundation → M29 RAG into turns → M30 NLU + palette → M31 agentic loop read-side → M32 task planner write-side → M33 copilot service → M34 copilot UI → M35 demo + hardening) and surfaces what paid off, what cost time, and what to carry into Phase 6. Zero code changes, zero tests, zero IPC/bus/migration work. Pure documentation deliverable.
acceptance: Section 1 — What we shipped: one-liner per milestone M28 → M34 (eight lines) + M35 current state. Each one-liner includes commit range, test delta, E2E delta, key architectural seam introduced.

Section 2 — What went well: enumerate the architectural seams that compounded — canned test seam QUARTET (test-classifier + test-agentic-provider + test-agentic-tools + test-copilot-provider); {rows, truncated} envelope on tool output; data-* stable E2E selector surface (data-step-kind / data-copilot-* / data-event-type — new from M35 T3); pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper; AbortController stop plumbing; is_system column + filter-sweep + isSystemRoleId predicate; atomic commit + ledger commit cadence (M34 deviated, M35 restored); ABI rebuild dance (Node for vitest, Electron for Playwright); IPC-mutation-emits-bus-event invariant #11; pure-helpers `.ts` + component `.tsx` split pattern (step-card-narrow precedent, newly applied in M35 T3).

Section 3 — What cost us time: Vitest/Playwright ABI mismatch dance; sqlite-vec extension load path in tests; FTS5 regression (docs/plans/2026-04-13-vault-backup-regression-findings.md); malformed tool-call parser nudge-retry wiring; F1/F2/F3/F4 follow-ups (useAgentStepStream backfill, useThreadList bus invalidator, CopilotEventWindow.clear wiring, post-restore system-employee bootstrap); vitest `@/` alias resolution cascade through Badge (surfaced in M35 T3 — resolved via pure-helpers split rather than config change); docblock accuracy drift (surfaced in M35 T2 → T3 transition); plan-vs-shipped test count drift (M35 T3 shipped +28 vs plan's +3).

Section 4 — What we deferred: insight export (CSV/JSON from Copilot sidebar); multi-company insight aggregation; drag-to-reorder for kanban/org-chart/insights; capabilities frontmatter on role.md (deferred from M32 T2 scoreEmployee improvements); post-launch telemetry digest (evidence-based clamp adjustment from real users); Phase 6 themes (cross-company rollups / proactive copilot → autonomous action / agent-to-agent negotiation / real customer demo).

Section 5 — Metrics table: test growth (612 Phase 4 → 1162 M35 T3 = +550 unit / +83%; E2E 4 → 11 spec files, 4 → 12 Playwright cases); LOC delta (approx via `git diff --shortstat` from Phase 5 branch-point commit); invariant count 10 → 11 (invariant #11 IPC mutations emit bus events introduced in M30 T8 after vault-backup regression); IPC channel count pre/post Phase 5 (count from TeamXApi union); bus event type count pre/post Phase 5 (count from EventType union — went from N pre-Phase-5 to 34 post-M34 including company.archived).

Section 6 — Phase 6 seeds: prioritized candidate themes sourced from Section 4 + CLAUDE.md `things to NOT do` boundary (no telemetry phone-home, no cloud sync without amendment); each candidate has a one-paragraph framing covering user value, architectural cost, and risk. No commitment — the retrospective SURFACES options; Phase 6 T0 will SELECT one.
Zero code changes, zero IPC, zero bus events, zero migrations. Pure markdown deliverable.
Link from docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md §15 (design decisions log) to the new retrospective for discoverability from the locked design doc.
Atomic commit: docs(m35): M35 T4 — Phase 5 retrospective.

Ledger commit: chore(loki): M35 T4 — commit ledger (<sha>) — roll orchestrator.json tasksCompleted 4 → 5, update pending.json T4 status pending → shipped, overwrite current-task.json to M35-T5 (Demo script + scripted walkthrough), prepend M35 T4 DONE subsection to .loki/CONTINUITY.md.
filesTouched: docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md (optional: add one cross-link line in §15 pointing at the new retrospective)
carryForward: M35 T3 closed: audit-event-chip-helpers.ts (pure helpers, 347 lines) + audit-event-chip.tsx (component shell, 89 lines) + audit-event-chip.test.tsx (28 unit tests, 263 lines). +28 unit tests (1134 → 1162). Chip module split mirrors step-card-narrow.ts + step-card.tsx convention. 10 newly-chipped Phase 5 event types (rag.index.* ×3, agent.step, agentic.completed, agentic.failed, copilot.* ×4). Payload-aware row summaries with hard 140-char clamp. A11y contract: aria-label='Event type: <literal>' + data-event-type stable E2E selector surface. rag.index.* chips land defensively — events are aspirational per CLAUDE.md bus-event table but NOT emitted by rag-indexer.ts today (indexer keys only on work.completed + meeting.ended).

Architectural seams reinforced by M35 T3: pure-helpers `.ts` + component `.tsx` split (step-card-narrow precedent); data-* stable E2E selector surface extended with data-event-type; a11y invariant (color never sole meaning carrier) enforced.
Phase 5 badge FROZEN at 'Phase 5' through v1.1.0 release. M35 T8 will pin the literal string in a unit test. Phase 6 work is the next session after M35 T10.
ABI state at start of T4: Node (post M35 T3 vitest). T4 is a pure docs task — no ABI rebuild required. Next rebuild needed at T8 unit-test addition (Node) or T10 full verification (both).

Test growth arc for Section 5 metrics: Phase 4 baseline 612 → M28 +29 → M29 +27 → M30 +146 → M31 +139 → M32 +75 → M33 +66 → M34 +31 → M35 T1 +4 → M35 T3 +28 → 1162 cumulative. +550 unit over Phase 5, +83% growth.

E2E growth arc for Section 5 metrics: Phase 4 baseline 4 specs → M30 T8 +1 (command-palette) → M31 T8 +1 (agentic-loop) → M32 T8 +1 (task-planner) → M33 T9 +1 (copilot-service) → M34 T10 +1 (copilot-ui) → M35 T2 +1 (phase-5-integration) → 11 spec files / 12 Playwright cases cumulative.

Retrospective scope boundary: NO new code, NO new tests, NO new IPC/bus/migrations. Pure documentation. Keep it executive-accessible while surfacing enough technical detail that a future Phase 6 architect can locate every architectural seam mentioned by grep / code-search. Match the tone of Rocky's existing retrospective + plan docs (executive, data-backed, direct, no marketing fluff).
Commit cadence: single docs(m35) atomic commit with the full retrospective body; single chore(loki) ledger commit. Both must land same session.
